title: session — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules for FormRequests + Data classes. Named after intent.

rules.name: valid_session_type
rules.description: Ensures session_type is one of the enum values.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of: practice, lesson, class, private_lesson, group_lesson, drop_in, workshop, trial, assessment, game, open_gym.

rules.name: valid_session_gender_category
rules.description: Ensures gender_category (when set) is one of male / female / mixed / any.

rules.name: valid_attendance_capacity
rules.description: Ensures attendance_capacity >= 1 when set. Additionally checks against session.resource_booking.facility.capacity_persons when both are set.

rules.name: valid_attendance_min
rules.description: Ensures attendance_min >= 1 when set AND attendance_min <= attendance_capacity when both set.

rules.name: valid_assistant_coaches_array
rules.description: Ensures assistant_coach_ids is an array of at most 3 unique coach ULIDs, none equal to head_coach_id.

rules.name: valid_equipment_needed_array
rules.description: Ensures equipment_needed is an array of short string tags (max 64 chars each, max 20 entries).

rules.name: valid_session_rating
rules.description: Ensures rating value is in [0, 5] with 2 decimal precision.

rules.name: valid_session_status_transition
rules.description: Ensures target status is a valid transition from the current status per the state machine.

rules.name: session_within_resource_booking_window
rules.description: Composite rule ensuring the referenced resource_booking is same-tenant + in an attachable state (pending/confirmed) + not already backing another session.

rules.name: session_coach_belongs_to_tenant
rules.description: Composite rule verifying head_coach_id + every entry in assistant_coach_ids has coach.tenant_id = session.tenant_id.

rules.name: session_athletes_belong_to_team
rules.description: For team sessions (team_id IS NOT NULL): validates that every athlete being registered for the session has an active AthleteEnrollment on the same team + season. Standalone sessions (team_id IS NULL) bypass this rule.

rules.name: no_overlapping_sessions_per_coach
rules.description: Refuses assigning a coach as head_coach or assistant to a session whose resource_booking window overlaps another active session where the same coach is assigned. Coaches cannot be in two places at once.

rules.name: attendance_capacity_not_exceeded
rules.description: Ensures registering the athlete would not exceed session.attendance_capacity. Used at attendance-create time.
